title: anthyllis vulneraria f. schiwereckii
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. schiwereckii, also known as kidney vetch, is a subspecies of the kidney vetch plant, a type of flowering plant in the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of kidney vetch include its ability to aid in the healing of skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and its potential to help reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential benefits.
